summary: Platform Integrations & Multi-Structure Retirement Testing - Iteration 100. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend fully functional with 5 tabs, 5 platform cards, Connect/Sync buttons, and bi-directional data flow capabilities.

issues: Important Information modal appears on every page load - consider adding 'Don't show again' option or localStorage persistence (noted in previous iterations)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all tabs, buttons, platform cards, and navigation working)

seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for file_notes, scenarios, and client profiles during API testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform Integrations fully functional. Backend implements mock APIs for 5 platforms (AMP North, Netwealth, Hub24, Class, IRESS) with bi-directional sync. Frontend has 5 tabs (Overview, Connections, Clients, Portfolios, Sync Logs) with platform cards showing READ and WRITE capabilities. Client Profile Retirement supports 6 structure types (Personal, Joint, Company, Trust, SMSF, Super Fund) with multi-structure calculations.

features_verified.GET /api/platforms/available: PASS - Returns 5 platforms with bidirectional=True, read_capabilities, write_capabilities
features_verified.POST /api/platforms/connect/{platform}: PASS - All 5 platforms connect in demo mode (amp_north, netwealth, hub24, class, iress)
features_verified.GET /api/platforms/status: PASS - Returns connection status for all 5 platforms
features_verified.GET /api/platforms/{platform}/clients: PASS - Returns mock client data for each platform
features_verified.GET /api/platforms/{platform}/clients/{c: PASS - Returns client with portfolio details
features_verified.POST /api/platforms/sync: PASS - Bi-directional sync with inbound/outbound records
features_verified.POST /api/platforms/write-back (file_not: PASS - Writes file_note back to platform
features_verified.POST /api/platforms/write-back (scenario: PASS - Writes scenario back to platform
features_verified.GET /api/platforms/sync-logs: PASS - Returns audit logs with log_id, platform, direction, timestamp
features_verified.GET /api/platforms/demo/portfolio-summar: PASS - Returns Total AUM $5,120,000 across 5 portfolios
features_verified.GET /api/client-profile/structures: PASS - Returns 6 structure types (personal, joint, company, trust, smsf, super_fund)
features_verified.POST /api/client-profile/multi-structure: PASS - Multi-structure accumulation calculation with projected_position
features_verified.POST /api/client-profile/retirement/save: PASS - Saves retirement data to client profile
features_verified.Frontend - /platform-integrations page l: PASS - Shows header, 4 summary cards, 5 tabs
features_verified.Frontend - Summary cards: PASS - Platforms Available (5), Connected (5), Total Clients (11), Total AUM ($5,120,000)
features_verified.Frontend - Overview tab: PASS - 5 platform cards with READ/WRITE capabilities, Connect/Sync buttons
features_verified.Frontend - Connections tab: PASS - Platform connection table with status, mode, last sync
features_verified.Frontend - Clients tab: PASS - All clients table with platform, client_id, name, risk_profile, balance
features_verified.Frontend - Portfolios tab: PASS - Portfolio summary with Total AUM, account details
features_verified.Frontend - Sync Logs tab: PASS - Audit logs with log_id, platform, direction, category, status, timestamp
features_verified.Frontend - Navigation: PASS - Platform Integrations link in Integrations section (Adviser Mode) with NEW badge

platform_integrations_summary.description: Bi-directional data sync with 5 enterprise wealth platforms for AdviceOS
backend_features: Write-back support for file_notes, scenarios, documents
Audit logging for all sync operations
Mock client and portfolio data for testing
frontend_features: 5 tabs: Overview, Connections, Clients, Portfolios, Sync Logs
4 summary cards: Platforms Available, Connected, Total Clients, Total AUM
Platform cards with READ/WRITE capability badges
Client table with platform, ID, name, risk profile, balance
Sync audit logs with direction indicators

features: 6 entity structure types with tax treatment info
Save retirement data to client profiles

mocked_apis.note: Platform APIs (AMP North, Netwealth, Hub24, Class, IRESS) are MOCK implementations with sample data. Real API connections require production credentials.
